title: LedgerAgent Event Schema
description: Schema for ledger entries recorded by the Ledger Agent. Every platform event is stored as an immutable entry.

entry_id.description: Unique, immutable identifier for this ledger entry.

trace_id.description: Trace identifier from the originating service or agent.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred.

payload.description: Event-specific data. Structure varies by event_type.

source_agent.description: The agent or service that produced this event.

duplicate.description: True if this event was deduplicated against an existing entry.

retention_days.description: Number of days this entry must be retained before archival.
